title: pycnanthemum curvipes
intro: Pycnanthemum curvipes, also known as curved-leaved mountain mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Pycnanthemum curvipes can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
